texto: [On Jason Mashak's book SALTY AS A LIP, as reviewed in The Prague Post:] Mashak amalgamates various national, historical and religious traditions into a myth-mash that illuminates many sects' fanatical compartmentalizing, and the fact that so many religions and philosophies share similar goals, if not roots.
explicacao: Citação de Stephan Delbos sobre temas ligados a fe. “[On Jason Mashak's book SALTY AS A LIP, as reviewed in The Prague Post:] Mashak amalgamates vario…” articula fe, history, myth em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como myth e philosophy.
